entry.title: Natural Spirulina Powder to boost Energy & Immunity
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: spirulina powder
Price: 199.00

Introducing 100% natural & pure Spirulina Powder. Spirulina is a blue-green algae that contains a vast variety of essential vitamins, & minerals such as thiamin, niacin, riboflavin, copper, potassium, magnesium, and iron. It also contains omega 3,6 and protein, in small amounts. The protein in spirulina is considered excellent and delivers essential amino acids. Consuming spirulina powder every day can help reduce oxidative stress by fighting damage caused by free radicals, hence boost immunity. Consuming Spirulina Powder can be beneficial in reducing fatigue, increasing energy and enhancing endurance. So, consume neuherbs Spirulina Powder daily to boost your immunity & energy in one go. neuherbs Spirulina Powder is produced from pure and natural Spirulina, offering a nutritionally rich combination of vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, and protein.

entry.title: True Vitamin Daily - Multivitamins For Overall Health and Strength
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Multivitamin Tablets
Price: 199.00

Does the diet you are taking are full of vitamins, minerals, healthy fats & antioxidants? And if yes, does it get properly absorbed by your body? Do you still feel lethargic after eating healthy food? The answer to all these questions is fulfilment of daily nutritional needs with appropriate absorption. And it is not an easy task. But including a multivitamin into the daily diet can help. Neuherbs True Vitamin Daily multivitamin tablet is formulated with 22 key ingredients which are validated by science to provide various health benefits. Neuherbs Multivitamin is a solution for today’s unhealthy habits of binging on fast food that only offers empty calories & zero nutrition. We designed this formula of Multivitamin (Vitamin A, E, C, D & B complex) Multimineral (Zinc, Magnesium, Copper, Selenium,) along with ginseng and antioxidant from Grape Seed extract (95% Proanthocyanins) to help you provide overall strength, stamina, enhanced immunity, support heart, brain health and improve quality of life.

entry.title: Plant-Based True Vitamin B12 Tablets For Energy & Brain
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True B12 Vitamin
Price: 275.00 - 549.00 (2 variants)

Vitamin B12 deficiency can lead to tiredness, muscle soreness, muscle cramps, uninvited fatigue, depression, and even mood swings. Vitamin B12 supplements are best for vegans & vegetarians that may promote better circulation, improve concentration and memory, keep the mind calm, promote nerve health, reduce tiredness, improve energy levels, and boost metabolic processes. It's the best Vitamin B12 supplement which consists of natural Vitamin B12 derived from spirulina to help you fulfill your daily Vitamin B12 needs. True B12 Vitamin tablet for men and women with Myo-Inositol which help promote better absorption that help maintain optimal brain functioning, reduce stress & anxiety and is a good mood enhancer. In addition, neuherbs True B12 Vitamin also contains folic acid and the goodness of Punarnava. Punarnava is best known for its rejuvenating properties that help the body recover oxidative stress and rejuvenate the body from within.

entry.title: True Magnesium Tablets - Relax Muscles & Mind, Support Bones
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Magnesium
Price: 399.00 - 699.00 (2 variants)

Magnesium is essential for proper heart function, energy production, hormonal balance, and muscle function. It is essentially known as the “Miracle Mineral” because of its versatile benefits. It also helps our body absorb Vitamin D3 better, promotes healthy nervous function, improves bone health, calms the mind, regulates insulin production, and keeps the body energized throughout the day. neuherbs True Magnesium is a high strength formula that contains 1600 mg of magnesium, that is uniquely paired with Zinc, Vitamin C, antioxidants like Blueberry, and Bilberry for maximum benefits. True Magnesium is created to fulfil your body’s daily magnesium needs. True Magnesium supplement contains 353mg of elemental Magnesium Bisglycinate in a more bioavailable form which is gentle on stomach. It effectively contributes to keeping the muscle relaxed, helps improve energy levels, promote sound sleep, calms the mind, fights free-radical damage, improves immunity & promote better muscle recovery.

entry.title: True Vitamin Women: Multivitamin Tablets For Women
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Vitamin Women
Price: 349.00 - 698.00 (2 variants)

Created explicitly for adult women to help manage their daily nutritional needs. neuherbs True Vitamin Women multivitamin tablets contains 34 ingredients including four essential blends that provide comprehensive wellness support. The multivitamin tablets offer 100% RDA of essential vitamins with vital minerals, amino acids, and plant-based vitamin D3, which help women nourish and improve their bones, heart, immunity, and hair- skin effectively. These multivitamin tablets for women help manage hormonal balance, elevated mood and poor reproductive health. The amino acids with vitamin b complex help with fatigue and boost energy levels required to carry out daily tasks effectively.

entry.title: True Multivitamin Adult 40+ Tablets - Immunity, Energy, Digestion
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Vitamin Adult
Price: 449.00 - 898.00 (2 variants)

Scientifically designed for men and women above 40 years of age, neuherbs True Multivitamin Adults 40+ tablet is made with 13 vitamins, 9 minerals and unique herbal blend essential for the body’s optimal functioning that naturally starts declining after 40. True multivitamin tablets offer great digestive benefits due to the presence of digestive enzymes & probiotics content in it, helping you in smooth digestion, better nutrient absorption and happy mood as well. A natural blend of ginseng and L lysine may improve metabolism and overall energy levels considerably. Its herbal blend containing ayurvedic herbs like Brahmi and Bhringraj helps calm the mind, improve focus & mental clarity. neuherbs True Multivitamin Adults 40+ is further enriched with plant-based Vitamin D3 to maintain healthy bones & maximize well-being.

entry.title: True Calcium Tablets with Plant Vitamin D3 for Stronger Bones
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: true calcium
Price: 299.00 - 598.00 (2 variants)

An amazing 3-in-1 supplement for daily bone and muscle care, neuherbs True Calcium supplement by neuherbs contains 1000 mg of calcium in a more bioavailable Calcium Citrate form, more-bioavailable Vitamin D3, and natural Magnesium. All three vital nutrients work together to maintain strong bones, increase bone density, support muscle, tendon relaxation and contraction, reducing the risk of fractures and brittle bones later in life. True Calcium, the plant-based calcium tablets, help fill the daily calcium gap in adults. Paired with Vitamin D3 it supports better absorption of calcium in the body. Th unique combination of magnesium & calcium in these calcium tablets for bones works synergistically to support muscles contraction, relaxation & improve overall flexibility.

entry.title: Organically Spirulina Tablets for High Energy, Immunity and Weight Management for Men and Women
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Spirulina Tablet
Price: 349.00

Spirulina is one of the most nutritionally dense substances known to man, with antioxidants, phytonutrients, probiotics, along with micro and macronutrients, alongside vitamins such as beta carotene, vitamin C, and vitamin E or minerals such as iron, calcium, chromium, copper, phosphorus, and potassium. Spirulina has several health benefits. We at neuherbs bring to you the goodness of spirulina, in a convenient tablet form, to help you avail its nutritional benefits whenever convenient, throughout the day. Thus, neuherbs Spirulina tablets made with 100% natural & Organic spirulina in tiny tablets compared to regular tablets thus are easy to incorporate into your daily routine and also do not contain any artificial additives which maintains its purity as well as safety.

entry.title: Organically Certified Moringa Tablet for High Energy, Detoxification and overall wellness for Men and Women

Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Moringa Tablet
Price: 299.00

neuherbs bring to you the goodness of Organic Moringa in the form of easy-to-use tablets that are enriched with essential nutrients to help you enjoy every day with full energy. Neuherbs Moringa Tablets are made from pure, natural organic moringa leaf powder without added preservatives, colour or any extra additives, which as per studies are a rich source of protein, vitamins, minerals, fiber & antioxidants. Organic Moringa tablets can be easily incorporated into daily lifestyles to obtain their natural health advantages including high energy, stronger immunity, body detoxification, reduced inflammation & holistic wellness. So, add this magical herb to your diet & avail yourself of several health benefits with it.

entry.title: Moringa Powder for Immunity, Weight Loss, Gut Health
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Organic Moringa Powder
Price: 199.00 - 249.00 (2 variants)

Moringa are the leaves of a delicious vegetable drumstick. Also known as the miracle tree or ben oil tree, moringa is highly nutritious and loaded with antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties. It is also rich in Vitamin A, C, and B complex, Calcium, Iron, Magnesium, and Dietary Fiber. Moringa leaves are low in fat and don’t contain bad cholesterol. Moringa leaf has a unique and delicious taste – popularly used in dals, sabjis, chapati dough, and smoothies etc. Moringa leaves offer a wealth of health benefits, ranging from enhancing immunity, supporting weight loss, promoting a healthy gut, to improving vision. Buy Moringa Leaf Powder, which is 100% preservative and additive-free, pure, and natural by neuherbs. The neuherbs moringa powder is also an excellent source of Amino acids and, therefore, is known to increase stamina, vitality, and energy levels. Consuming neuherbs Moringa Powder regularly can ensure better health and well-being, so grab now.

entry.title: Ashwagandha Powder - Boost Energy, Reduce Stress
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Organic Ashwagandha Powder
Price: 199.00 - 398.00 (2 variants)

Ashwagandha is an evergreen Ayurvedic medicinal herb that’s been used for over 3000 years to promote health and wellbeing. Also referred to as the Indian Ginseng, Ashwagandha helps rejuvenate body and mind alike, manage stress, improve mood, induce calmness, increase stamina and energy levels, manage inflammation, and reduce oxidative stress. Ashwagandha helps manage insomnia, stress, anxiety, and promote calmness in mind & body. Ashwagandha also contains antioxidants that are known to improve immunity. Ashwagandha powders are designed to improve sleep quality and sleep cycle, relax the mind, and manage tiredness and general fatigue that’s associated with all day stress. neuherbs 100% pure & natural Ashwagandha Powder is made from the finest Ashwagandha root to access the maximum benefits of withanolides:the active ingredient of ashwagandha.

entry.title: Ashwagandha 1000 Plus Tablets – Daily Lifestyle Support
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Ashwagandha Tablets
Price: 319.00 - 598.00 (2 variants)

neuherbs Ashwagandha 1000 Plus is made with natural ashwagandha root extract, Vitamin E, and B-complex (B6, B9, B12), along with piperine. This blend is designed to help maintain balance, support an active lifestyle, and promote everyday wellness.
